title: MutALink
author: Gribble, Jennifer
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Scripts utilized to identify and quantify candidate mutations present in the same molecule of SARS-CoV-2 RNA. Datasets were derived from long-read amplicon sequencing on the Oxford Nanopore Technologies MinION platform.
steps_raw: Scripts utilized to identify and quantify candidate mutations present in the same molecule of SARS-CoV-2 RNA. Datasets were derived from long-read amplicon sequencing on the Oxford Nanopore Technologies MinION platform.
